stemHtml: Which statement is true with regard to the frequency band used for aviation communication? Choose the best statement…

options.a: To the two bands immediately below SHF, expressed in MHz.
options.b: To the two bands immediately below SHF, expressed in kHz.
options.c: To the two bands immediately below UHF, expressed in kHz.
options.d: To the two bands immediately above MF, expressed in MHz.
